channel.title: Leadership on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Leadership on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer

item.title: The Soft Side of Tech Lead: Managing 150M User Migrations
item.description: Technical migrations are as much about people and communication as they are about code and infrastructure.
item.content:encoded: Coming soon — a candid look at the human side of large-scale migrations, including stakeholder alignment, risk communication, and the art of making big changes feel small.
